data.title: Nationwide launches USD 1.5bn covered bond under €45bn programme
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nationwide Building Society ( (GB:NBS) ) has issued an announcement.

Nationwide Building Society has published the final terms for a new USD 1.5 billion fixed-rate regulated covered bond issue, carrying a 3.996% coupon and maturing in April 2029 under its €45 billion Global Covered Bond Programme. The bonds are guaranteed as to principal and interest by Nationwide Covered Bonds LLP, underscoring the society’s continued use of large-scale secured funding to diversify its investor base and reinforce long-term funding for its core lending operations.

The documentation for the Series 2026-04 issuance has been made available via the London Stock Exchange’s document service and submitted to the U.K. Financial Conduct Authority’s National Storage Mechanism for public inspection. This latest transaction signals Nationwide’s ongoing access to international capital markets, helping to underpin its funding resilience and support its competitive positioning in the covered bond segment.

Spark’s Take on NBS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NBS is a Neutral.

Nationwide Building Society’s overall score reflects strong corporate events and a solid financial foundation, offset by technical indicators suggesting potential overbought conditions and concerns over leverage and cash flow. The stock appears undervalued, but the lack of a dividend yield and high leverage are notable risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NBS stock, click here.

More about Nationwide Building Society

Nationwide Building Society is a U.K.-based mutual financial institution operating in retail banking, best known for its mortgage lending, savings products, and other personal finance services. As one of the country’s largest building societies, it regularly taps wholesale funding markets, including covered bond issuances, to support its lending activities and balance sheet management.

Average Trading Volume: 921

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £1.36B

data.title: Zijin Mining Sets 2026–2028 Dividend Framework With 35% Payout Target
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Zijin Mining Group Co ( (HK:2899) ) is now available.

Zijin Mining Group has approved a profit distribution and return plan for 2026 to 2028 that formalizes how it will balance shareholder returns with long-term development needs. The framework is designed to ensure continuity and stability in dividend policy while considering factors such as profitability, cash flow, investment demand, and external financing conditions.

Under the plan, the company will prioritize cash dividends as the main form of profit distribution, with the option to use bonus shares or reserve-to-equity conversions when appropriate. Subject to meeting specified profit and audit conditions, Zijin intends to distribute profits at least once a year, and cumulative cash dividends for 2026–2028 will in principle be no less than 35% of cumulative distributable profits, reinforcing its commitment to investor returns without compromising sustainable operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2899) stock is a Buy with a HK$49.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zijin Mining Group Co stock, see the HK:2899 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zijin Mining Group Co

Zijin Mining Group Co., Ltd. is a major Chinese mining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of mineral resources, with a portfolio that typically includes gold, copper, and other non-ferrous metals. The company focuses on large-scale resource development and operates globally, balancing growth investments with returns to shareholders in its capital allocation strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 78,042,415

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1050.1B

data.title: Greatview Aseptic posts 2024 results as trading suspension on HKEX continues
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) has provided an announcement.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has released its audited annual results for the year ended 31 December 2024, with the full annual report to be provided to shareholders and made available on the websites of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and the company in due course. The disclosure fulfills Hong Kong listing requirements, but the company’s shares remain suspended from trading, with the halt that began on 19 February 2025 continuing until further notice, leaving investors without clarity on when liquidity in the stock will resume.

The board composition is unchanged, comprising executive, non‑executive and independent non‑executive directors, underscoring ongoing corporate governance structures during the trading suspension period. The continuation of the suspension may affect shareholder confidence and could influence the company’s market visibility and access to capital while stakeholders await further updates on the status of trading in its shares.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Hong Kong‑listed manufacturer of aseptic packaging solutions for the beverage and liquid food industry. The group, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and headquartered in Beijing, serves dairy and drink producers with carton packaging products and related services in domestic and international markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

data.title: Lytix Biopharma’s Lead Cancer Therapy Highlighted in ASCO 2026 Combination Study
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Lytix Biopharma AS ( (DE:6BG) ) is now available.

Lytix Biopharma announced that aggregate Phase II data from its ATLAS-IT-03 and ATLAS-IT-05 studies of ruxotemitide (LTX-315) in combination with pembrolizumab have been selected for presentation at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting in Chicago. The data cover patients with unresectable advanced melanoma resistant to prior anti-PD-1 or anti-PD-L1 therapies and immunotherapy-naïve triple negative breast cancer patients, underscoring the potential of the combination to drive durable anti-tumor responses and reinforcing Lytix’s strategic positioning in difficult-to-treat solid tumors.

The poster, to be presented by Prof. Aurélien Marabelle of Gustave Roussy, will focus on safety and efficacy outcomes from intratumoral ruxotemitide plus pembrolizumab, with the company highlighting how the drug’s mechanism may convert immunologically “cold” tumors into “hot” ones to improve checkpoint inhibitor responses. Following the conference, Lytix plans to share the poster on its website, which could draw increased attention from clinicians, partners and investors monitoring emerging immunotherapy combinations in melanoma and triple negative breast cancer.

More about Lytix Biopharma AS

Lytix Biopharma ASA is a clinical-stage immuno-oncology biotech based in Oslo, Norway, focused on developing novel intratumoral cancer therapies derived from host-defense peptides. Its lead product, ruxotemitide (formerly LTX-315), is a first-in-class oncolytic molecule being developed across multiple cancer indications as both monotherapy and in combination with checkpoint inhibitors, and the company is listed on Euronext Growth Oslo under the ticker LYTIX.

Average Trading Volume: 59,252

Current Market Cap: NOK784.4M

For an in-depth examination of 6BG stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

Aquila Energy Efficiency Trust PLC ( (GB:AEET) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Parvus Energy Efficiency Trust plc has changed its name from Aquila Energy Efficiency Trust plc after Aquila Capital ceased acting as its investment adviser, but its London Stock Exchange ticker, ISIN and SEDOL identifiers remain unchanged, and existing share certificates will stay valid. The board also corrected an error in the previously disclosed performance fee structure under a consultancy agreement, clarifying the calculation for fees linked to asset realisations below 80 per cent of asset net asset value, which provides shareholders with greater transparency over adviser incentives and governance arrangements.

Terex ( (TEX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Terex Corporation announced on April 17, 2026, that it will host a conference call to review its first quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. President and CEO Simon Meester and Senior Vice President and CFO Jennifer Kong-Picarello will lead the call, with results to be released on the company’s investor relations website prior to the event.

The call will be accessible via a public webcast, with a replay available afterward on the same platform. The planned briefing underscores Terex’s efforts to maintain transparency with investors and other stakeholders around its quarterly performance and outlook, reinforcing engagement with the market as it pursues growth in its targeted end markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TEX) stock is a Buy with a $95.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Terex stock, see the TEX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TEX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TEX is a Neutral.

The score is driven most by a mixed financial profile—improving free cash flow but compressed margins and higher leverage. Technicals are supportive with a clear uptrend, while valuation is only moderate with a low dividend yield. Earnings-call guidance and merger synergies are positives, partially offset by tariffs, higher interest expense, and integration/execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on TEX stock, click here.

More about Terex

Terex Corporation is a global leader in specialized equipment solutions serving essential sectors such as emergency services, waste and recycling, utilities, and construction. The company designs and manufactures specialty vehicles, waste collection trucks, materials processing machinery, mobile elevating work platforms, and electric utility equipment, supported by a global dealer, parts and service network and digital solutions.

With a strong manufacturing footprint in the United States and operations across Europe, India, and Asia Pacific, Terex combines global reach with local expertise to pursue opportunities worldwide. Its strategy centers on exceeding customer expectations, investing in innovation, leveraging a diversified portfolio, and delivering consistent, profitable growth for shareholders.

data.title: Sony and Honda Scale Back Sony Honda Mobility, Rethink EV Joint Venture Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sony Group ( (SONY) ) is now available.

On April 21, 2026, Sony Group, Honda Motor, and their joint venture Sony Honda Mobility said they had agreed on a new direction for the mobility unit after halting development of its AFEELA 1 and second electric vehicle models in March 2026. The companies concluded it would be difficult to deliver products aligned with Sony Honda Mobility’s original mission under the current framework in the short to medium term, and will scale down operations, reassign most employees back to Sony, Honda, and affiliates, and continue to explore future collaboration focused on software-led user experiences and advanced driver assistance systems, while Sony reviews the impact on its consolidated results.

The decision to shrink Sony Honda Mobility reflects strategic shifts in Honda’s electrification roadmap and highlights execution challenges in bringing a new EV brand to market quickly. While the move curtails near-term ambitions in premium EVs, the partners signal they remain committed to mobility innovation and are repositioning their cooperation around software and in-car experience, a change that could influence how both companies participate in the evolving automotive technology landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (SONY) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sony Group stock, see the SONY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SONY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SONY is a Neutral.

The score is anchored by solid cash generation and a manageable balance sheet, but is held back by the sharp TTM profitability setback (negative net margin/ROE) and weak technical trend (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation signals are also constrained by the negative P/E and low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SONY stock, click here.

More about Sony Group

Sony Group Corporation is a diversified Japanese conglomerate operating across consumer electronics, gaming, entertainment, and imaging technologies, with a growing focus on software-driven services. Through joint ventures and partnerships, including its collaboration with Honda in mobility, Sony has sought to extend its technology and user-experience expertise into next-generation automotive and mobility solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 6,154,957

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $128.5B

data.title: Zijin Gold International Posts Surging Q1 2026 Profit on Higher Gold Output and Prices
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Zijin Gold International Company Limited ( (HK:2259) ) has provided an update.

Zijin Gold International reported strong unaudited results for the first quarter of 2026, with mine-produced gold output reaching 13.46 tonnes, including contributions from newly acquired Akyem and Raygorodok mines. Revenue more than doubled year on year to about USD2.06 billion, profit attributable to owners surged to USD807 million, operating cash flow strengthened significantly, and key balance sheet metrics including total assets and equity improved.

The Group’s all-in sustaining cost rose to USD1,638 per ounce, mainly due to higher gold prices driving up royalty payments, but the robust pricing environment underpinned strong profitability and cash generation. Management plans to intensify exploration, accelerate technological upgrades, tighten cost control and governance, and pursue the acquisition of Allied Gold Corporation in the second quarter of 2026, signaling an aggressive growth and consolidation strategy in the gold mining sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2259) stock is a Buy with a HK$253.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zijin Gold International Company Limited stock, see the HK:2259 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zijin Gold International Company Limited

Zijin Gold International Company Limited is a Hong Kong-incorporated gold producer focused on mine-produced gold, with operations and assets spread across multiple jurisdictions. Its portfolio includes recently acquired mines such as the Akyem Gold Mine in Ghana and the Raygorodok Gold Mine in Kazakhstan, which are expanding the Group’s production base and international footprint.

Average Trading Volume: 6,572,513

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: MMEX Resources Launches Private Preferred Unit Offering
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MMEX Resources ( (MMEX) ) just unveiled an update.

MMEX Resources, through its subsidiaries Pecos UltraClean Refining, LLC and Trans Permian Energy, LLC, has launched a private offering of preferred membership units to accredited investors, with a maximum raise of $5.0 million. Each investment grants investors an equal number of preferred units in both subsidiaries and a common membership interest of 0.1% per $100,000 invested, aligning investor returns with the performance of both entities.

The preferred units provide for a return of capital plus an 18% make-whole payment upon the closing of project financing through either debt or equity by the subsidiaries. As of April 20, 2025, the company had accepted $500,000 in aggregate subscriptions, indicating initial investor participation in the financing structure designed to support MMEX’s project funding and potentially strengthen its capital base for future development.

More about MMEX Resources

MMEX Resources operates through subsidiaries Pecos UltraClean Refining, LLC and Trans Permian Energy, LLC, which are focused on energy infrastructure and refining projects in the Permian region. The company’s activities center on developing and financing project-level ventures, targeting investors interested in energy-related preferred and common equity stakes.

Current Market Cap: $1.11M
